punctuation.description: Em/en-dash as casual punctuation — strongest structural AI tell (research: >3 per 500 words is a tell)

ai_cliches.description: AI-era buzzwords rarely used by human writers. Refresh this list from the 'recurring AI tells' section of the source research.

transition_spam.description: Mechanical paragraph openers that AI uses to signal structure artificially (research: 'transition-word spam')
